zh.lifeSummary: 當Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd於大約1410年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾格林利方時，他的父親Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur71歲，母親Nest ferch Cynwrig49歲。他於1409年與Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾格林利方結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾格林利方享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd于大约1410年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾格林利方时，他的父亲Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur71岁，母亲Nest ferch Cynwrig49岁。他于1409年与Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾格林利方结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾格林利方享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

en.lifeSummary: When Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd was born about 1410, in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur, was 71 and his mother, Nest ferch Cynwrig, was 49. He married Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn in 1409, in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1460, in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd est né environ 1410, à Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur, avait 71 ans et sa mère, Nest ferch Cynwrig, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn en 1409, à Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1460, à Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd um 1410 in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur 71 und seine Mutter Nest ferch Cynwrig 49. Er hat 1409 in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd è nato il circa 1410 nel Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur, aveva 71 anni e il suo madre, Nest ferch Cynwrig, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn nel 1409, nel Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwydが約1410年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグリンリフォンで生まれた時，父Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudurは71歳，母Nest ferch Cynwrigは49歳であった。1409年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグリンリフォンでGwenhwyfar ferch Llywelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグリンリフォンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그린리폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur(은)는 71세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest ferch Cynwrig(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그린리폰에서 Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그린리폰에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur, tinha 71 anos e sua mãe, Nest ferch Cynwrig, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn em 1409, em Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1460, em Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd родился около 1410 г. в местности глинллифон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur было 71 год, а матери, которую звали Nest ferch Cynwrig, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn в 1409 г. в местности глинллифон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности глинллифон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maredudd ap Hwlcyn Llwyd nació aproximadamente 1410, en Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur, tenía 71 años y su mamá, Nest ferch Cynwrig, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn en 1409, en Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 51 años.
